73674.body: 96 рҹҰһ GenAI Adoption Climbs @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body { width: 100%; min-width: 100%; } table.body .content { padding: 0 !important; } table.body .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table.body .main { border-spacing: 10px 0 !important; border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table.body .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } } @media all { .ExternalClass { width: 100%; } .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass font, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div { line-height: 100%; } .apple-link a { color: inherit !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: inherit !important; text-decoration: none !important; } #MessageViewBody a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table[class=body] h1 { font-size: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; } table[class=body] p, table[class=body] ul, table[class=body] ol, table[class=body] td, table[class=body] span, table[class=body] a { font-size: 16px !important; } table[class=body] .wrapper, table[class=body] .article { padding: 10px !important; } table[class=body] .content { padding: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .main { border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .btn table { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .btn a { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } table[class=body] p[class=small], table[class=body] a[class=small] { font-size: 11px !important; } } .kg-nft-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.3; padding-top: 4px; padding-right: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-bottom: 4px; } .kg-twitter-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 15px; padding: 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-sponsor-label a { color: #ff4141 !important; } .kg-cta-text a:not(.kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a) { color: #000000; text-decoration: none; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a { color: #ff4141 !important; } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body .kg-bookmark-card { width: 90vw; } table.body .kg-bookmark-thumbnail { display: none !important; } table.body .kg-bookmark-metadata span { font-size: 13px !important; } table.body .kg-embed-card { max-width: 90vw !important; } table.body .kg-cta-card { padding: 0 20px; } table.body .

73671.subject: рҹҳұ All of DeFi is at risk
73671.body:
TodayвҖҷs newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick OвҖҷNeill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger youвҖҷll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure youвҖҷre subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

## Top Stories

**BTC** $75,645 (-1.9%) | **ETH** $2,077 (-2.0%) | **SOL** $84 (-1.6%)

* OpenZepplinвҖҷs founder states that[ вҖңall of DeFi is unsafeвҖқ](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059536629967274416?s=20) due to increased capability of AI coding agents

* Micron (MU) [gains 6% after hours](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2059454290100387887?s=20) after gaining 19% on the day

* StriveвҖҷs SATA yield product generates enough volume above par to [acquire 539 BTC](https://x.com/piovincenzo_/status/2059380371838419370?s=20)

* Cumulative HYPE ETF [inflows surpass $100M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2059421372531581048?s=20) вҖ” BTC ETFs record 7th consecutive day of [net outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059553489345515577?s=20) вҖ” [$1.3B worth](https://x.com/EricBalchunas/status/2059378201432866867?s=20) of IBIT shares get dumped

* Banca Sella becomes first Italian bank to offer [crypto services](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059582938296324156?s=20)

* The Pump Fun app expands to [ETH, Base, and BNB](https://x.com/Pumpfun/status/2059299822130074024?s=20)

* US Government awards [$2.29B contract](https://x.com/tokens/status/2059402643429306596?s=20) to SpaceX for low Earth orbit space data network

* Trump says CFTC should have [exclusive authority](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2059384108325998606?s=20) over prediction markets вҖ” Says crypto is a major industry and the [US must protect it](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2059384986969464854?s=20)

* [UK sanctions HTX](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2059272479240011892?s=20) crypto exchange due to вҖңsupporting the government of RussiaвҖқ

* Victor Wembanyama rookie card[ sells for $5.1M](https://x.com/CardsMax/status/2059251259954135484?s=20)

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”


вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/all-of-defi-is-at-risk

The market cap sits at
$2.54T
this morning. ETH dropped roughly 2% overnight to near
$2.08K,
even as Bitmine made its largest ETH purchase of the year. BTC is
holding near
$76K,
still well below the $$82K level that capped last week's recovery
attempt.

The gap between institutional conviction and retail price action
has rarely felt wider. Long-term pattern analysts are pointing
toward price targets that seem far from today's reality. And a
World Cup meme coin just handed one trader a result that will be
hard to ignore.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Bitcoin's Chart Just Flashed a Massive Long-Term Signal

Technical analysts say Bitcoin has completed a multi-year
cup-and-handle pattern, with a minimum price target of $220,000
contingent on holding support near $74,000.

Spot trading volume has collapsed 81% from October 2025 highs, a
pattern analysts say signals seller exhaustion rather than
continued selling pressure.

What price level must Bitcoin hold to keep the bullish pattern
valid?

73662.subject: What is your maximum heart rate?
73662.body:
The EconomistвҖҷs week ahead

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: The Economist


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: The Economist

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-your-maximum-heart-rate-the-economist-fwxne?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bcvo7kR52Rr24hgZenUdeOA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1i-2REoslBFsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpnwgo1p~su-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpnwgo1p-su
  
Sign up for free here to receive this newsletter in your inbox every Saturday. YouвҖҷll also get our weekly newsletter with an exclusive introduction from our editor-in-chief. For someone who spends their days thinking about science and data, IвҖҷm oddly low-tech when it comes to exercise. I have one of the most basic sports watches on the market and I usually leave the built-in heart-rate monitor turned off. Whenever I train for anythingвҖ”in the past few years IвҖҷve been into trail marathonsвҖ”I plan my workouts based on feeling. I just find it more enjoyable that way. But for runners who prefer a more structured approach, one of the first steps is often to figure out their maximum heart rate. Many training plans are built around heart-rate вҖңzonesвҖқ, which are defined as either percentages of maximum heart rate or as fractions of the range between resting and maximum. If youвҖҷre getting into runningвҖ”or simply curious about the commonest method of calculating your maximum heart rateвҖ”read this edition of Well Informed. Our column on health and well-being also has a newsletter you can sign up for. It lands in your inbox every Sunday. Ainslie Johnstone, Data journalist and science correspondent EditorвҖҷs picks What is your maximum heart rate? We tell you how to find out Can high-intensity interval training get you fit in a hurry? Yes, but be prepared to suffer What is the best way to train for a marathon?В  Most people train too fast The most useful indicator of your overall health вҖңHeart-rate variabilityвҖқ has been decades in the making Are barefoot shoes good for runners? Aficionados swear by them. But the scientific jury is out Go beyond the headlines Get unlimited digital access to The Economist by subscribing today.
РҹСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-your-maximum-heart-rate-the-economist-fwxne?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bcvo7kR52Rr24hgZenUdeOA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1i-2REoslBFsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mpnwgo1p~su-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpnwgo1p-su
